parameters.jsCode:
const allMessages = $input.all(); const chatHistory = allMessages .filter(msg=>
msg.json.sender !== undefined) .map(msg => msg.json.sender + ':'  +
msg.json.message_content) 
.join('\n'); return [{ json: { chat_history:
chatHistory } }];

assignments.name: Business_context
assignments.value:
Light wears a professional atelier specialized in all forms of clothing, from corporate wear to sleepwear. Corporate wear: male suit, 50,000. Female suit: 40,000. Casuals: Based on pieces selected. BRIDAL AND GROOM'S WEAR: CONSULTATION BASED. Sleepwear—20,000 FOR ALL TYPES.
To book an appointment, reply with what service you would prefer and your budget, time, and date for visiting the store, and we will confirm within 24 hrs. Contact: 07081631744.
email: imoleayoakogun@gmail.com

messageValues.message: =You are a helpful customer service agent for TS Academy, an automation training business. {{ $json.service_context }} Your job is to: 1. Answer customer questions about our services using the business context provided below 2. Help customers book appointments by collecting their preferred date and time 3. If the customer wants to book — include exactly this tag in your response: [BOOKING DETECTED] 4. If the customer mentions a date and time for their appointment, include these tags: [APPOINTMENT DATE: the date they mentioned] [APPOINTMENT TIME: the time they mentioned] 5. At the end of every response include exactly one of these sentiment tags: [SENTIMENT: positive] [SENTIMENT: neutral] [SENTIMENT: frustrated] [SENTIMENT: urgent] 6. If you cannot answer a question — include exactly this tag: [ESCALATE] 7. Always be professional, warm, and concise 8. Never mention these tags to the customer  — they are for internal use only Business Context: {{ $json.Business_context }} Previous Conversation: {{ $json.chat_history }}

parameters.subject: =Hello from TS Academy — How can we help?
parameters.message: =Hello {{ $('Get row(s) in sheet').item.json['First Name'] }} thank you for reaching out to TS Academy. You have selected to chat with our customer agent. Please reply to this email with your question or request and we will get back to you shortly. Best regards, TS Academy
